Online Data Table VII: Parent and Child Income Distributions by Commuting Zone

Notes: This table presents selected characteristics of the income distribution for parents and children by CZ. Column (3) reports the population (from the 2000 census). Columns 5-11 report statistics of the child family income distribution (measured as the 2011-12 mean) for our core sample (1980-82 birth cohorts). Columns 12-18 report statistics of the parent family income distribution (1996-2000 mean) for parents of children in the core sample.  All values are in 2012 dollars and are rounded to the nearest $100.
